claim_note: Real on-device offline streaming ASR via native sherpa-onnx. NOT a launch-support claim; support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence (WER/CER, RTF, p95 latency, memory, battery, thermal).

runtime.integration: vendored prebuilt Android AAR (apps/android/app/libs/sherpa-onnx-1.13.2.aar); no Maven Central artifact exists for com.k2fsa.sherpa.onnx (solrsearch numFound=0)

en-zipformer-mid-high-2023-06-26.real_transcription: recognizer instantiated and ran on real captured audio without crash; no staged EN test clip, so no decoded text captured (honest)

model_provisioning_note: Android 11+ scoped-storage isolates the per-app mount view: files pushed by `adb shell` into another app's Android/data are NOT visible through the app's own getExternalFilesDir() FUSE view. For the device demo, the model files were copied into the app's INTERNAL filesDir via `run-as ... cp`, which the app reads natively. AsrModelStore checks internal filesDir first for exactly this reason. In production, first_run_download writes to internal storage directly, so no FUSE caveat applies.
